case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A VS. ADRIAN C. KNOTTER

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A AS TO DEFENDANT KNOTTER, ADRIAN C SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-08-2017

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNOTTER, ADRIAN C $9,263.62 PRINCIPAL, $433.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,697.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61701065)
